recommended_overlap_notes: Public GEO/SRA metadata do not prove donor overlap or donor independence with DS099/GSE83381. GSE161031 has 30 PBMC RNA-seq samples from 5 inferred Crohn donors: three SP140 SNP-/- donors aged 66/54/49 and two SP140 SNP+/+ donors aged 31/52, each profiled across six LPS/topotecan/etoposide/DMSO conditions. Public IDs are GSM4888680-GSM4888709, BioSamples SAMN16692394-SAMN16692423, SRA study SRP291527, BioProject PRJNA675222. None of these exact GEO/SRA/BioSample/BioProject IDs appear in DS099, but DS099 lacks ages or stable donor IDs that could rule out shared people. Keep component_of_dataset_id empty and countability Unclear.
manual_review_notes: No public donor crosswalk found. To resolve beyond Unclear would require source-controlled donor metadata, author supplement with stable donor IDs, or controlled/private sample manifest.

recommended_overlap_notes: Public GEO/SRA metadata do not prove donor overlap or donor independence with DS095/GSE161031. GSE83381 has 20 RNA-seq samples split across Crohn PBMC genotype/LPS samples, non-disease WT PBMC controls, and PBMC-derived macrophage SP140 knockdown samples. Public labels include CD T/T rep1/rep2, CD C/C rep1/rep2, WT C/C rep1/rep2, and macrophage Donor 1/Donor 2 labels, but these are local replicate/donor labels without ages or stable IDs that can be reconciled to DS095. Public IDs are GSM2200449-GSM2200460 and GSM2344751-GSM2344758, BioSamples SAMN05253178-SAMN05253189 and SAMN05907780-SAMN05907787, SRA study SRP076599, BioProject PRJNA325740. No exact public accession overlap with DS095 was found. Keep component_of_dataset_id empty and countability Unclear.
manual_review_notes: No public donor crosswalk found. Different BioProjects/SRA studies/publications support separate records, but not proven independent human donors.
